title: Nethergates
description: This datapack adds six unique Nether portals to the Overworld, each themed after a different Nether biome. Some are quiet landmarks, others deadly traps
body:
This datapack adds six hand-crafted Nether portal structures to world generation, each themed after a different Nether biome. Every Nethergate includes a Bastion treasure chest! But be warned — not all gates simply offer easy access to the Nether... some may bring the Nether to you.

They can spawn in the following biomes:

**Soul Sand Valley Portal**
- Badlands
- Desert
- Mangrove Swamp
- Swamp
- Savanna
- Savanna Plateau
- Windswept Gravelly Hills
- Pale Garden
- Snowy Plains
  
**Basalt Deltas Portal**
- Badlands
- Desert
- Savanna
- Savanna Plateau
- Windswept Gravelly Hills
- Pale Garden
- Snowy Plains
- Plains
  
**Bastion Portal**
- Badlands
- Desert
- Savanna
- Savanna Plateau
- Windswept Gravelly Hills
- Pale Garden
- Snowy Plains
- Plains
  
**Seeping Portal (Nether Wastes)**
- Badlands
- Desert
- Savanna
- Savanna Plateau
- Windswept Gravelly Hills
- Snowy Plains
- Plains
  
**Crimson Forest Portal**
- Wooded Badlands
- Forest
- Flower Forest
- Taiga
- Old Growth Pine Taiga
- Old Growth Spruce Taiga
- Snowy Taiga
- Birch Forest
- Old Growth Birch Forest
- Dark Forest
- Pale Garden
- Jungle
- Sparse Jungle
- Bamboo Jungle
- Cherry Grove
  
**Warped Forest Portal**
- Wooded Badlands
- Forest
- Flower Forest
- Taiga
- Old Growth Pine Taiga
- Old Growth Spruce Taiga
- Snowy Taiga
- Birch Forest
- Old Growth Birch Forest
- Dark Forest
- Pale Garden
- Jungle
- Sparse Jungle
- Bamboo Jungle
- Cherry Grove
